# Ascend Systems

> Charlotte, NC technology consultancy. One senior engineer — Brian Mangum —
> building custom SaaS, AI agents, internal tools, and legacy modernization
> for owner-operator and small-to-midsize businesses. Operating entity is
> Lighthouse 27 LLC.

Ascend Systems is a solo senior-engineer consultancy, not an agency and not a
staffing firm. Engagements are direct with the engineer who writes the code.
Typical work: replacing spreadsheet and paper processes with custom internal
software, building customer-facing SaaS products, wiring LLM/AI agents into
existing business workflows, and modernizing legacy systems.

Primary stack: TypeScript, React, Astro, Cloudflare Workers, D1, Supabase,
PostgreSQL, Stripe.

Contact: hello@ascendsystems.ai

## Services

- [Services overview](https://ascendsystems.ai/services): Custom SaaS
  development, AI agent and LLM integration, internal tools and dashboards,
  legacy system modernization, fractional CTO engagements.
- [Software cost calculator](https://ascendsystems.ai/tools/cost-calculator):
  Free estimator for custom software project cost, by scope and complexity.

## Case studies

Detailed engineering write-ups, each covering the problem, architecture,
stack decisions, and measured outcome.

- [CLT EV Analytics](https://ascendsystems.ai/portfolio/clt-ev): Municipal EV
  charging analytics dashboard for the City of Charlotte — 208 ChargePoint
  stations, role-based views, cost intelligence on Cloudflare's edge.
- [RecordStops](https://ascendsystems.ai/portfolio/recordstops): Independent
  record store directory across five states — 296 stores, 16 city guides,
  683 organic visitors/month with zero ad spend.
- [PottyDirectory](https://ascendsystems.ai/portfolio/pottydirectory): 3,447-vendor
  portable restroom directory on Astro + Supabase + Cloudflare, with a lead
  funnel that produced four organic leads in 72 hours.
- [SC DMV Alerts](https://ascendsystems.ai/portfolio/scdmv-alerts): Real-time
  DMV appointment alert service on Cloudflare Workers + D1 + SendGrid. 65
  locations monitored, live and paying subscribers in under three weeks.
- [Deadrop](https://ascendsystems.ai/portfolio/deadrop): Zero-knowledge
  burn-on-read secret sharing — client-side AES-GCM, KV TTL expiry,
  self-hostable and white-labelable.
- [Ringdocket](https://ascendsystems.ai/portfolio/ringdocket): Community-sourced
  iOS call-blocking app with FTC-seeded block list and 3-account corroboration.
- [SendMyLove](https://ascendsystems.ai/portfolio/sendmylove): An honest
  post-mortem on a consumer subscription that shipped in two weeks, delivered
  2,515 messages, and earned $0 MRR.

## About

- [About Brian Mangum](https://ascendsystems.ai/about): Senior full-stack
  engineer and fractional CTO based in Charlotte, NC.
- [Contact](https://ascendsystems.ai/contact): Project inquiries.
